productName: Stingers - Live Resin Cartridge - Wifi Alien - 1g
description: This hybrid cartridge loads WiFi OG into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Flavor on the go, a pungent earthy-pine and fuel aroma with a strong, classic, relaxing feel, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
